caption:
A lead calls at 9:47 PM. Here's what happens next inside an automated pipeline.

Example workflow shown below, not a specific client's account.

The CRM logs the lead the moment the form hits submit. A text goes out in under 5 minutes, asking a real question instead of confirming a receipt.

Every stage change triggers the next step on its own: quote sent, reminder scheduled, follow-up logged. Nobody has to remember to do it.

Most service businesses take hours to respond to a new lead. A pipeline that moves itself closes the job before the next call gets returned.

Want your own lead's path built like this?

DM "PIPELINE".

#leadfollowup #CRMforcontractors #speedtolead #homeservicesmarketing #localservicemarketing
rationale: Fills the under-served Demonstrations/System Walkthroughs category with a clearly-labeled example CRM pipeline flow, using the carousel format research shows wins saves and depth for B2B/educational content.
